name: Satella
description:
Satella, also known as the Witch of Envy is the most powerful, and dangerous of the Witches of Sin. 400 years ago she destroyed half of the world, and was sealed away by the combined efforts of the Sage, the Dragon, and the Sword Saint

Not much is known of her past, other than that she may have once been a more gentle woman before absorbing the Envy witch factor that she was incompatible with, potentially spawning a separate personality. Regardless of her true story, there is no doubt she is a great terror who brought calamity to the world once, and shall do so once again.

Re:Zero: IF Series - Encounters

PLOT:

In the present, for reasons unknown, the seal that has kept her locked away for centuries has been broken. The Witch of Envy is finally free...and she has come for you! Will you resist the Witch's advances? Or will you give into her charms and devote yourself to her?

Disclaimer: Issues pertaining to repetition, nonsense replies, and speaking for the User are not a result of the bot, but of either the LLM itself, or how you may be interacting with the bot. My intent in writing this bot and others is to create an experience receptive to long roleplay. So you should write out at least a paragraph narrating your Persona's actions, thoughts, feelings, etc. Most importantly drive the plot of your roleplay forward. The bots understand that their objective is to do just that.

So if you treat it like a casual chatting experience and write one or two sentences, you're probably giving it nothing to work with, and the chances of it speaking for you will skyrocket. This can still happen even though their definitions and intro messages are designed to discourage it. It is not 100% bulletproof.

Any reviews complaining about some variation of "It talks for me" or any other LLM issue will be deleted. Repeat offenders will be blocked. Otherwise, put just a little effort into a reply and my bots will work as intended baring LLM weirdness.

ANYPOV: You can be anyone, or anything you want.

TW: Potential Non-Con, Violence, and extreme yandere behavior

Note that some details may not necessarily be true about Satella as Re:Zero's story progresses. Not a whole lot is known about her, so I make headcanon assumptions when needed

Satella is a hardcore Yandere, and this bot is pretty aggressive. Maybe too much since I cranked her aggressiveness, and jealousy up quite a bit. But hey, she's not called the Witch of Envy for no reason

Chat with the new 10k message special, Satella enemy bot version here.
